What is Star Wars?: Star Wars is a science fiction franchise created by George Lucas.
What is Breaking Bad?: Breaking Bad is a crime drama television series created by Vince Gilligan.
What is Game of Thrones?: Game of Thrones is a fantasy television series based on the novels by George R. R. Martin.
What is Stranger Things?: Stranger Things is a science fiction horror television series created by the Duffer Brothers.
What is The Walking Dead?: The Walking Dead is a post-apocalyptic television series centered on a zombie outbreak.

What is Minecraft?: Minecraft is a sandbox game focused on building, exploration, and survival.
Who created Minecraft?: Minecraft was created by Markus Persson, also known as Notch.

What is Pokémon?: Pokémon is a multimedia franchise centered around collectible creatures.
What is Dragon Ball?: Dragon Ball is a Japanese manga and anime series created by Akira Toriyama.
